data.title: US Shoppers Plan To Spend $2,100 This Holiday Season, 7% Higher Than 2023: When Should Traders Start Buying Retail Stocks?

data.title: Deckers Outdoor Delivers Better-Than-Expected Q2 Earnings Led By Strength In HOKA, UGG Brands
data.description: Deckers reported second-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, beating analyst estimates of $1.2 billion. The casual footwear and apparel company reported second-quarter earnings of $1.59, beating analyst estimates of $1.23 per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Bill Gates Net Worth: Billionaire's $50 Million Donation To Kamala Harris Is Like An Average Family Giving $318.90
data.description: Comparing the size of Bill Gates' $50 million donation to support Kamala Harris in the 2024 election to the wealth of the average American family.
